label: CIS Safeguard 15.1
title: Establish and Maintain an Inventory of Service Providers

prose.en: Establish and maintain an inventory of service providers. The inventory is to list all known service providers, include classification(s), and designate an enterprise contact for each service provider. Review and update the inventory annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.
An inventory of service providers is established and maintained.
The inventory lists all known service providers, including classification(s), and designates an enterprise contact for each service provider.
The inventory is reviewed and updated annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.
